title: alangium chinense var. vulgare
intro: Alangium chinense var. vulgare, also known as the Chinese alangium, is a type of flowering plant in the Cornaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Alangium chinense var. vulgare can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its herbal uses.
